channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Siri Settlement: Apple Agrees to Pay $95 Million Over Eavesdropping Allegations
item.description: Apple agrees to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the company of eavesdropping on iPhone users through Siri, raising concerns over personal privacy.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Chinese cyber firm linked to botnet attack sanctioned in US
item.description: The federal government hit Chinese cyber group Integrity Technology Group with new sanctions on Friday, citing alleged computer intrusion incidents against those in the U.S. At the direction of the China, hackers associated with the Integrity Technology Group allegedly targeted multiple U.S.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: AI PCs
item.description: Virtually every aspect of technology has been affected, and potentially improved, by artificial intelligence (AI). PCs are no exception. While the meaning of “AI PC” is still evolving, it generally refers to a computer specifically designed to excel at AI-powered tasks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple settles Siri eavesdropping accusations for $95M
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a class-action lawsuit alleging the tech giant used its voice assistant Siri to obtain and share private conversations without users' permission.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: For Apple IT admins, the new year means it’s a good time to upskill
item.description: Continuing education has always been important for IT professionals, but the need to keep your skill set up to date is now more important than ever.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Top 9 generative AI use cases for business
item.description: The launch of ChatGPT in November 2022 set off a generative AI gold rush, with companies scrambling to adopt the technology and demonstrate innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple to pay $95 million to settle lawsuit accusing Siri of eavesdropping
item.description: Apple has agreed to pay $95 million to settle a lawsuit accusing the privacy-minded company of deploying its virtual assistant Siri to eavesdrop on people using its iPhone and other trendy devices.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Your new AirTag has a hidden warning that's just for kids – and it's for the best
item.description: Apple's AirTag is now in compliance with US's Reese's Law, according to the government's consumer product safety watchdog.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: California begins 2025 with solid start to winter snowpack, but more storms are needed
item.description: California is beginning 2025 with a solid start to the winter snowpack, but more storms are needed to keep the state’s water supplies on track.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Antioch brackish desalination plant set to begin operations
item.description: Antioch's brackish desalination plant will kickstart operations in the first quarter of 2025. It is expected to treat and convert 6 million gallons a day of brackish water.
item.dc:creator: Hema Sivanandam, The Mercury News

item.title: Venezuela's top court issues a $10 million fine for TikTok over allegedly deadly video challenges
item.description: CARACAS, Venezuela (AP) — Venezuela’s Supreme Court on Monday issued a $10 million fine against TikTok for “not implementing measures” to prevent viral video challenges that have allegedly led to the deaths of three Venezuelan children recently.
item.dc:creator: JUAN PABLO ARRAEZ and MANUEL RUEDA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rhode Islanders' data was leaked from a cyberattack on state health benefits website
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (AP) — Cybercriminals who hacked Rhode Island’s system for health and benefits programs have released files to a site on the dark web, a scenario the state has been preparing for, Gov. Daniel McKee said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hands-on with Adobe’s Acrobat AI Assistant: AI for your PDFs
item.description: We may be on the brink of 2025, but PDFs are still unavoidable in the professional world. No matter what industry you work in, you’re bound to whittle away precious moments wading through reports, white papers, and other dense documents in that clunky-feeling form.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 10 hot programming trends
item.description: Tides ebb and flow. Pendulums swing. Ideas come and go, especially in programming, where the technologies and techniques for creating software continuously evolve. Some programming languages, libraries, platforms, and tools become hot and irresistible.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple Mail app redesign introduces new categorization feature in iOS 18.2
item.description: In iOS 18.2 and later, Apple's Mail app enhances email management by automatically sorting messages into distinct categories to help find emails faster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge
item.description: Gain insights into the future of ICAM and its role in secure, modern government operations. The post Modern ICAM strategies: Real-time identity management across agencies, partners and at the tactical edge first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network
